title: Hashcat
description: The world's fastest password recovery tool — GPU-accelerated hash cracking with advanced attack modes.
fullExplanation: Hashcat is the world's fastest and most advanced password recovery utility. It uses GPU acceleration to crack password hashes at billions of attempts per second. Supports 300+ hash types including MD5, SHA-1, bcrypt, NTLM, WPA2, and more. Multiple attack modes allow cracking from wordlists, brute force, rule-based mutations, and combination attacks.

attackModes.description: Try each word in wordlist as-is. Fast, effective for common passwords.
Combine words from two wordlists: password + 123 = password123
Try all combinations matching a mask: ?u?l?l?l?d?d = Abcd12
Wordlist word + mask suffix: password?d?d = password12

keyFacts: RTX 4090: 164 billion MD5 hashes/second — 8-char MD5 cracked in seconds
bcrypt/Argon2 designed to be slow — 184k/s on RTX 4090 vs 164G/s for MD5
rockyou.txt: 14M real passwords — most effective starting wordlist
Rules transform wordlist: password → P@ssw0rd, Password1, PASSWORD
Hashcat potfile: remembers cracked hashes — don't re-crack
Distributed cracking: hashcat.net, hashtopolis for cluster cracking
Always use on hashes you own or have authorization to crack
